articles.title: Taylor Swift’s Wedding Is Going to Cost *How* Much?! Here’s How It Compares to Normal Nuptials
articles.content:
重大周末终于来了！不，我说的不是这个国家的250岁生日，虽然那也很令人兴奋。当然，我说的是另一个里程碑式的全国性活动，一个庆祝我们国家两大出口产品的活动：娱乐和体育。是的，这是众人期待已久的泰勒·斯威夫特与特拉维斯·凯尔斯在纽约市麦迪逊广场花园的婚礼。

抱歉，是传言中的婚礼。几个月来猜测不断，但似乎这两个疯狂的人将在他们各自职业领域最著名的场馆，用“我愿意”为这段三年的爱情故事画上句号。麦迪逊广场花园——7月2日和3日预订了两场活动——本周热闹非凡，相关许可已提交申请关闭街道。

当然，这可能完全是障眼法——据我们所知，他们可能已经结婚了（罗德岛曾被提及），这只是场盛大的派对。但随着倒计时进入大日子，我们百分百确定的一件事是，这场盛会将耗资巨大。到底有多贵？继续往下看。

据《今日》报道，令人瞠目的数字从低端的1000万美元到超过2500万美元不等，取决于谁在做预测。是的，这很贵，但这是纽约！还有泰勒！当你开始计算安保、娱乐以及租用这个巨大场地的费用时，成本会迅速累积。

麦迪逊广场花园的预订费用从每天100万到200万美元不等。但这只是基本租金。你还得考虑保险，而且如果他们带来自己的舞台团队，可能需要买断现有的舞台工作人员。别忘了灯光。甚至还有（据传）为名人顾客建造豪华卫生间的计划。

多方消息来源称，活动和所有出席名人的安保费用可能高达每天100万到200万美元。据CNN报道，这对新人想要一个“密封环境”，远离狗仔队、跟踪者和其他窥探的目光，你可以肯定这种安保不便宜。

鲜花是任何婚礼最昂贵的部分之一，可以肯定这两个人不会自己动手做花束来降低成本。（《人物》杂志报道，凯尔斯花了38,000美元将后院改造成一个鲜花盛开的花园来求婚。）CNN引用的婚礼策划师表示，虽然50万美元对于高端婚礼来说并不罕见，但斯威夫特的婚礼花费可能轻易达到100万美元。

关于这场婚礼的这方面信息没有太多确凿资料，但《第六页》拍到了大量食物被送到麦迪逊广场花园的照片，包括龙虾、鸡肉、鸡蛋和新鲜农产品。一位知情人士告诉NBC新闻，高端婚礼的三道菜宴会每位宾客的餐饮费用约为600美元，不过这场婚礼可能远高于此。

总得有人让舞池热起来，《滚石》杂志报道斯威夫特的偶像兼好友史蒂维·尼克斯本周末会在麦迪逊广场花园。泰勒首支热门单曲的主人公蒂姆·麦格劳也据传会出席（可能还会表演？），还有海姆乐队、艾德·希兰和其他音乐界嘉宾。

据一家名人经纪公司透露，史蒂维·尼克斯每场活动的出场费约为200万美元。但由于她和斯威夫特是朋友，她可能只是去支持——也许还会与新娘合唱。换句话说，这个价格还在待定。

这只是冰山一角。根据The Knot对去年结婚的超过10,000对美国夫妇的调查，2025年婚礼的平均费用为34,200美元。无论你是国际巨星还是在教堂地下室结婚的普通人，费用的最大驱动因素都是地点、地点、地点——而纽约市位居榜首。

不，但它确实与一些昂贵的婚礼不相上下。以下是一些其他著名（以及不太著名）婚礼的价格标签。（榜单上这两对夫妇？阿南特和伊沙是兄妹……而且是印度首富的孩子。）
articles.summary:
The big weekend is finally here! No, I do not mean the nation’s 250th birthday, though that’s also exciting. Of course, I am talking about another milestone national event, one that celebrates two of our country’s major exports: entertainment and sports. Yes, it’s the long-anticipated Taylor Swift–Travis Kelce wedding at Madison Square Garden in New York City.

Excuse me, the rumored wedding. Speculation has been high for months, but it appears that these two crazy kids will cap off their three-year love story by finally saying yes at the most famous venue for both of their chosen professions. The Garden—booked for two events on July 2 and 3—is buzzing with activity this week, and permits have been filed to close off the streets.

Now, it’s entirely possible this is all subterfuge—for all we know, they are already married (Rhode Island was bandied about) and this is just a giant party. But as the clock counts down to the big day, one thing we definitely know with 100% certainty is that this shindig is going to be expensive. Just how pricey are we talking? Read on.

Get Reader’s Digest’s Read Up newsletter for more entertainment news, cleaning, humor, travel, tech and fun facts all week long.

How much are experts estimating this wedding could cost?

The eye-popping numbers range from a low of $10 million to well over $25 million, depending on who’s doing the speculating. Yes, that’s pricey, but it’s New York! And Taylor! When you start tallying the security and the entertainment and the cost of renting the massive venue itself, things can add up quickly.

How does this break down, exactly?

Venue: $8 million to $10 million

Rates for booking the Garden run anywhere from $1 million to $2 million per day, Today reports. But that’s just the baseline rent. You also have to factor in insurance, and the couple might have to buy out existing staging crews if they’re bringing in their own. And don’t forget lighting. There’s even the (rumored) construction of luxury bathrooms for the clientele’s celebrity tushies.

Security: $3 million to $6 million

Security for the event and all the celebs in attendance could top $1 million to $2 million per day, according to multiple sources. CNN reports that the couple want a “hermetically sealed environment” away from paparazzi, stalkers and other prying eyes, and you can bet that kind of security is not cheap.

Flowers: $1 million

Flowers are one of the most expensive parts of any wedding, and rest assured that these two won’t be reducing costs by making their own bouquets. (People reports that Kelce spent $38,000 transforming his backyard into a flower-filled garden for the proposal.) A wedding planner quoted by CNN says that while $500,000 is not unheard of for high-end weddings, Swift’s could easily hit the $1 million mark.

Food: $700,000 to $1 million-plus

There’s not as much hard info about this aspect of the Swift-Kelce nuptials, though Page Six snapped tons of pictures of food, including lobster, chicken, eggs and fresh produce, being delivered to Madison Square Garden on Wednesday. A source told NBC News that catering for a high-end wedding with a three-course meal costs about $600 per head, though this one will likely be much higher.

Entertainment: Possibly $2 million-plus

Someone has to get the dance floor hopping, and Rolling Stone reports that Swift’s idol and good friend Stevie Nicks will be at Madison Square Garden this weekend. Tim McGraw, the subject of Taylor’s first hit, is also rumored to be in attendance (and potentially performing?), as are Haim, Ed Sheeran and other musically inclined guests.

According to a celebrity booking agency, Stevie Nicks commands roughly $2 million per event. But since she and Swift are pals, it’s possible she’s just there for moral support—and perhaps a duet with the bride. In other words, this price tag is up in the air.

How does this compare to a normal wedding?

It’s just a smidge more. The average cost of a wedding in 2025 was $34,200, according to a survey by The Knot of more than 10,000 U.S. couples who got married last year. The biggest driver of the cost, whether you’re an international superstar or a regular person getting married in a church basement, is location, location, location—and New York City tops the list.

Is this the most expensive wedding ever?

No, but it’s definitely rubbing shoulders with some pricey unions. Here are the price tags for some other famous—and not-so-famous—nuptials. (Those two couples at the top of the list? Anant and Isha are siblings … and the children of the richest man in India.)

  • Anant Ambani and Radhika Merchant: $600 million
  • Isha Ambani and Anand Piramal: $100 million
  • Jeff Bezos and Lauren Sanchez: $46 million to $55 million
  • Prince Charles and Diana Spencer: $48 million
  • George Clooney and Amal Alamuddin: $4.6 million
  • Kim Kardashian and Kanye West: $2.8 million

Sources:

  • Today: “So, How Much Does a Wedding at Madison Square Garden Actually Cost?”
  • Rolling Stone: “Stevie Nicks Will Be at Taylor Swift’s Wedding — And Might Perform”
  • Mediaite: “Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce Creating a ‘Hermetically Sealed Environment’ for Their Wedding in the Middle of NYC”
  • CNN: “The price tag behind Taylor Swift’s rumored wedding bash at Madison Square Garden”
  • The Knot: “Average Wedding Cost”
  • Page Six: “Stevie Nicks and Tim McGraw set to perform at Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce’s wedding — which will be ‘bigger than the Met Gala’”
  • Page Six: “Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce’s possible wedding menu uncovered as lobster, French fries and more are delivered to MSG”
  • The Knot: “The Most Expensive Weddings in History, Ranked by Their Eye-Popping Price Tags”
  • People: “Taylor Swift’s Fairytale Engagement Flowers Likely Cost Up to $38K and Used Over 2,000 Blooms, Says Expert”

The post Taylor Swift’s Wedding Is Going to Cost *How* Much?! Here’s How It Compares to Normal Nuptials appeared first on Reader's Digest.

articles.title: This Popular Discount Department Store Is Opening 12 New Locations This Month! See If One Is Coming to Your Area
articles.content:
如果你心目中的理想购物之旅包括名牌商品的超低价位，还有那种不用花设计师品牌价格就能淘到时尚单品的刺激感……那咱们想法一致。（我是说，谁不喜欢捡到便宜货呢？）

幸运的是，美国最受欢迎的折扣百货商店之一正在扩大规模，即将开设12家新门店——其中一些可能会出乎意料地靠近你。如果你和我一样，想到一家全新开业、库存充足的商店就兴奋不已。

冷知识：这家零售商每年吸引数亿顾客前来购物，是折扣购物领域最大的品牌之一。所以，如果你一直希望附近能开一家，或者只是想看看它下一步会在哪里扩张，你肯定会想知道自己的地区是否在名单上。

继续往下看，找出是否有一个新的购物天堂即将来到你身边。

伯灵顿将于今年7月开设12家新门店。这家折扣百货商店与TJ Maxx、Marshalls、Ross Dress for Less和Century 21同属一个折扣大家族——也就是说，这种地方就是你进去只想买双袜子，结果却拎着新手袋、抱枕和咖啡机出来的类型。

与竞争对手一样，伯灵顿以折扣价购买品牌商品，然后以比传统百货商店低60%的价格出售。库存不断变化，所以这种购物体验与其说是从精心策划的系列中挑选，不如说更像是在发现意外惊喜的刺激。每周可能货架上摆满了设计师运动鞋，下一周又换成了厨房小工具、行李箱或家居装饰品。这就是为什么这么多购物者把每次进店都当成寻宝之旅。

新门店还将采用伯灵顿更新的布局设计，让顾客更容易浏览。在关于扩张的声明中，首席执行官迈克尔·奥沙利文表示：“我们期待让购物者有机会探索超值的优惠、发现新品牌，无论他们住在何处，都能体验我们全新改进的门店设计。”

如果你好奇这一切有什么好兴奋的，本月你将有几家新的伯灵顿门店可以选择。以下是预计开业的地点：

如果你一直以为伯灵顿只卖冬季外套，那你绝不是一个人。这是因为这家零售商最初确实是1972年作为伯灵顿外套工厂开业，靠户外服装建立了声誉。但多年来，顾客不断回来寻找的远远不止外套，公司的商品种类早已超越了最初的定位。

最终，店名与顾客在店内发现的东西不再匹配。2014年至2016年间，伯灵顿逐步停用了“外套工厂”的名称，简称为伯灵顿。所以，虽然这个名字可能仍然让你联想到一排排羽绒服，但这其实只是对公司在起步时期的一种怀旧。
articles.summary:
If your idea of a good shopping trip includes name brands for wayyyy less and that little thrill of scoring something chic without the designer price tag … well, same. (I mean, who doesn’t love a good deal?)

Luckily for us, one of America’s favorite off-price department stores is getting even bigger, with 12 new locations on the way—some of which could be popping up surprisingly close to you. And if you’re anything like me, the thought of a brand-new store packed with fresh inventory is reason enough to get excited.

Fun fact: This retailer welcomes hundreds of millions of shoppers every year, making it one of the biggest names in off-price shopping. So if you’ve been hoping one would open a little closer to home or you’re just curious to see where it’s expanding next, you’ll definitely want to know if your area made the list.

Read on to find out whether a new bargain-hunting destination is headed your way.

Get Reader’s Digest’s Read Up newsletter for more shopping news, cleaning, travel, tech and fun facts all week long.

What discount department store is opening new locations?

Burlington is opening 12 new stores this July. The discount department store is part of the same off-price family as TJ Maxx, Marshalls, Ross Dress for Less and Century 21—meaning it’s the kind of place where you walk in looking for a pair of socks and somehow leave with a new handbag, throw pillows and a coffee maker.

Like its competitors, Burlington buys brand-name merchandise at discounted prices and sells it for up to 60% below traditional department-store prices. Inventory changes constantly, so the experience is less about shopping from a carefully curated collection and more about the thrill of discovering an unexpected bargain. One week, there may be shelves full of designer sneakers; the next, it’s kitchen gadgets, luggage or home decor. That’s exactly why so many shoppers treat every visit like a treasure hunt.

The new stores will also feature Burlington’s updated layout, designed to make browsing even easier. In a statement about the expansion, CEO Michael O’Sullivan said, “We look forward to giving shoppers the chance to explore great savings, find fresh brands and experience our new and improved store design no matter where they live.”

Where will they be located?

If you’re curious to see what all the excitement is about, you’ll have several new Burlington stores to choose from this month. Here’s where shoppers can expect the doors to open:

  • Hillsboro, Oregon (July 3)
  • Houston, Texas (July 3)
  • Montclair, California (July 10)
  • Quakertown, Pennsylvania (July 10)
  • Paris, Tennessee (July 10)
  • Austin, Texas (July 10)
  • Forney, Texas (July 10)
  • Lubbock, Texas (July 17)
  • Keizer, Oregon (July 17)
  • Moscow, Idaho (July 23)
  • Salem, Oregon (July 31)
  • Denton, Texas (July 31)

Is Burlington really more than just coats?

It is! If you’ve ever assumed Burlington only sells winter coats, you’re definitely not alone. That’s because the retailer actually started life as Burlington Coat Factory when it opened in 1972, building its reputation around outerwear. But over the years, shoppers kept coming back for much more than coats, and the company’s inventory grew far beyond its original niche.

Eventually, the name no longer matched what customers were finding inside the stores. Between 2014 and 2016, Burlington gradually retired the words Coat Factory from its branding and shortened the name to simply Burlington. So while the name may still make you picture racks of puffer jackets, that’s really just a throwback to where the company got its start.

Source:

  • USA Today: “Burlington Opening 12 Stores Across These 6 States in July”
